api/_208_Group_Project_Demo.Blackjack.ht.title: Class Blackjack
api/_208_Group_Project_Demo.Blackjack.ht.summary: Class Blackjack Namespace _208_Group_Project_Demo Assembly 208_Group_Project_Demo.dll Represents a game of blackjack, managing the card shoe, player and dealer hands, and game logic. public class Blackjack Inheritance object Blackjack Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Constructors Blackjack() public Blackjack() Properties currentState public BlackjackState currentState { get; } Property Value BlackjackState playerHand public List<Card> playerHand { get; } Property Value List<Card> playerValue public int playerValue { get; } Property Value int Methods DealCards(List<Card>, int) Deals n cards to either the player or the dealer, specified with toPlayer public List<Card> DealCards(List<Card> toHand, int n = 1) Parameters toHand List<Card> The hand the cards are dealt to n int The number of cards to deal Returns List<Card> The hand with cards dealt to it DealerTurn() Executes the dealer's turn in the Blackjack game, updating the dealer's hand and game state according to standard rules. public void DealerTurn() EndGame() Ends the current blackjack game, determines the outcome based on player and dealer hands, and outputs the result. public BlackjackResult EndGame() Returns BlackjackResult A BlackjackResult value indicating the outcome of the game. HandToString(List<Card>) Returns a comma-separated string of card IDs from the given hand. public static string HandToString(List<Card> hand) Parameters hand List<Card> The list of Card objects representing the hand. Returns string A string containing the IDs of the cards in the hand, separated by commas. HandValue(List<Card>) Calculates the total value of a hand of cards, treating aces as 1 or 11 to maximize the hand's value without exceeding 21. public static int HandValue(List<Card> hand) Parameters hand List<Card> The list of cards whose value is to be calculated. Returns int The total value of the hand. LookAtDealerHand() public List<Card> LookAtDealerHand() Returns List<Card> PlayBlackjack() Plays a complete game of blackjack between the player and the dealer, handling all game logic and user interaction. public BlackjackResult PlayBlackjack() Returns BlackjackResult A BlackjackResult indicating the outcome of the game. PlayerTurn(BlackjackAction) Processes the player's action during their turn in a game of Blackjack. public void PlayerTurn(BlackjackAction playerAction) Parameters playerAction BlackjackAction The action chosen by the player, such as Hit or Stand. ShoeCount() public int ShoeCount() Returns int StartBlackjack() Initializes and starts a new game of blackjack, dealing cards to the player and dealer and updating the game state. public void StartBlackjack()
